title: verbascum × nothum subsp. nouelianum
intro: Verbascum × nothum subsp. nouelianum, a subspecies of the flowering plant Verbascum × nothum, is a hybrid between Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum thapsus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × nothum subsp. nouelianum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, often combined with other herbs, to create herbal remedies that promote overall well-being and respiratory health.
